document.title: Supplier's Declaration of Conformity
standards: FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B

sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier's Declaration of Conformity for Battery Recharger model DEPS126002 under FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents declared conformity of the tested Battery Recharger sample with FCC electromagnetic emission limits based on test report KES-EM244555.
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
FCC rule parts listed are FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B, Part 15.107(b), and Part 15.109(b).
Test report reference number is KES-EM244555.
